name: Snapstick
summary:
🎄 
We've just added a brand new chapter featuring 20 new holiday-themed levels to nourish your festive spirits! Wrap gifts, build snowmen, and most importantly, deliver a pregnant raptor to the hospital to deliver its out-of-wedlock child. Experience the miracle of Christmas! {"height":720,"type":"video","width":1280}

Aside from that, Snapstick is a perfectly normal puzzle game about connecting things together. It's perfect for normal people. Okay? Okay. Don't worry about it.

WHAT'S IN THE BOX?
